display.purpose: Page-level headings only. One per page. 'Dashboard', 'Asset Manager', 'Relationships'.

headline.purpose: Major content section headings. Rare — used when a page has a primary/secondary content split.

title.purpose: Card headers, panel headings, tree category names. The most common heading level.

body.purpose: Table cells, form inputs, sidebar nav links, descriptions. The primary reading size.

label.purpose: Table column headers only. 0.75rem / 600 / uppercase / 0.05em tracking. Not for section labels or card eyebrows.

shadows.name: primary-glow
shadows.purpose: CTA buttons and the sidebar logo mark only. Signals the primary action on the current screen.

shadows.name: card-ambient
shadows.purpose: Baseline elevation for card surfaces. Near-invisible on dark; readable in light theme.

shadows.name: modal-lift
shadows.purpose: Modals and dialogs — above the card plane.

shadows.name: login-lift
shadows.purpose: Login card only. One-off surface rule for the app entry point.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Keyboard focus indicator for all interactive elements. Signal Blue at 20% opacity.

motion.name: transition-fast
motion.purpose: Row hovers, icon color shifts, button hover background. Immediate feedback.

motion.name: transition-normal
motion.purpose: Button background, nav item state, input focus ring. Standard state change.

motion.name: transition-slow
motion.purpose: Progress bar width changes, data bar fills.

breakpoints.name: sm
breakpoints.purpose: Stat grid collapses from 6 to 2 columns

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.purpose: Page header stacks; tree layout collapses to single column

breakpoints.name: lg
breakpoints.purpose: Dashboard main grid collapses from 2 to 1 column

breakpoints.name: xl
breakpoints.purpose: Stat grid collapses from 6 to 3 columns

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single primary CTA in any given context. Used for 'Create', 'Save', 'Add'. Never more than one per toolbar.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"><line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"/><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"/></svg>Tambah Aset</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #3c83f6; color: #ffffff; border: none; padding: 0.6rem 1.2rem; border-radius: 12px; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(60, 131, 246, 0.2); transition: background 200ms ease, box-shadow 200ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #2563eb; box-shadow: 0 4px 18px rgba(60, 131, 246, 0.35); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(60, 131, 246, 0.35), 0 4px 14px rgba(60, 131, 246, 0.2); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.6; cursor: not-allowed; box-shadow: none; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action appearing alongside a primary button. 'Import', 'Export', 'Back'.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-ghost"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2v-4"/><polyline points="17 8 12 3 7 8"/><line x1="12" y1="3" x2="12" y2="15"/></svg>Import</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: transparent; color: #e2e8f0; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); padding: 0.6rem 1.2rem; border-radius: 12px; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms ease, border-color 200ms ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); border-color: #94a3b8; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(60, 131, 246, 0.2); } .ds-btn-ghost:disabled { opacity: 0.45; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Icon-prefixed search field used in page toolbars. The icon shifts to Signal Blue on focus.
components.css: .ds-input-search { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; min-width: 240px; } .ds-input-search__icon { position: absolute; left: 12px; color: #94a3b8; pointer-events: none; transition: color 200ms ease; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-input-search:focus-within .ds-input-search__icon { color: #3c83f6; } .ds-input-search input { width: 100%; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); border: 1px solid transparent; padding: 0.6rem 1rem 0.6rem 2.5rem; border-radius: 8px; color: #e2e8f0; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; outline: none; transition: box-shadow 200ms ease, border-color 200ms ease; } .ds-input-search input::placeholder { color: #94a3b8; } .ds-input-search input:focus { border-color: #3c83f6; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(60, 131, 246, 0.2); }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Navigation link in the sidebar. Shown in both default (muted) and active (Signal Blue tinted) states.
components.html: DashboardAsetRelasi
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 10px 16px; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #94a3b8; border-radius: 12px; text-decoration: none; transition: background 200ms ease, color 200ms ease; margin-bottom: 2px; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); color: #e2e8f0; } .ds-nav-item--active { background: rgba(60, 131, 246, 0.1); color: #3c83f6; border-left: 4px solid #3c83f6; padding-left: 12px; }

components.name: Status Badge — Active
components.description: Semantic status indicator. Pill-shaped with 10%-tint background and full-opacity semantic text.
components.html: ActiveMaintenanceRetired
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-badge--active { background: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.1); color: #22c55e; } .ds-badge--maintenance { background: rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.1); color: #f59e0b; } .ds-badge--critical { background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.1); color: #ef4444; } .ds-badge--inactive { background: rgba(100, 116, 139, 0.2); color: #64748b; }

components.name: Card Panel
components.description: Primary surface container. Used for tables, distribution charts, quick-nav grids. Never nest inside another card.
components.html:
Aset Terbaru Diperbarui

Content goes here.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #1a1d27; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-card__head { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding: 1rem 1.4rem; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); } .ds-card__title { font-size: 0.92rem; font-weight: 600; color: #ffffff; margin: 0; } .ds-card__link { font-size: 0.8rem; color: #3c83f6; background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; padding: 0; font-weight: 500; font-family: inherit; } .ds-card__link:hover { text-decoration: underline; } .ds-card__body { /* no default padding — content type dictates */ }

components.name: Stat Cell
components.description: Dashboard stat tile. Icon + value + label. Used in a 6-column responsive grid across the dashboard header.
components.html:
42
Total Aset
components.css: .ds-stat { background: #1a1d27; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); border-radius: 14px; padding: 1rem 1.1rem; display: flex; gap: 0.9rem; align-items: flex-start; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-stat__icon { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 0.45rem; border-radius: 9px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-stat__val { font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 700; color: #ffffff; line-height: 1; } .ds-stat__lbl { font-size: 0.78rem; color: #94a3b8; margin-top: 0.2rem; }

components.name: Asset Icon
components.description: Color-matched icon container. The signature micro-pattern: the asset type's own hex color at 20% opacity as background, full opacity as icon foreground. Used in tables (32px), cards (48px), and the sidebar logo (40px).
components.css: .ds-asset-icon { width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 10px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--icon-color) 20%, transparent); color: var(--icon-color); flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Data Table Row
components.description: The primary information surface. Uppercase tracked column headers, row hover, no inner borders between columns.
components.html:
NamaTipeStatusDiperbarui
SRV-PROD-01
ServerActive2j lalu
LAPTOP-DEV-07
LaptopMaintenance1h lalu
components.css: .ds-table-wrap { overflow-x: auto; } .ds-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-family: Inter, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; } .ds-table th { padding: 0.55rem 1.25rem; text-align: left; font-size: 0.7rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: #94a3b8; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); font-weight: 600; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); } .ds-table td { padding: 0.7rem 1.25rem; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05); color: #e2e8f0; } .ds-table__row { cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms; } .ds-table__row:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); } .ds-table__row:hover td:first-child span { color: #3c83f6; } .ds-table__row:last-child td { border-bottom: none; } .ds-asset-icon { width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 10px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--icon-color) 20%, transparent); color: var(--icon-color); flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-badge--active { background: rgba(34,197,94,0.1); color: #22c55e; } .ds-badge--maintenance { background: rgba(245,158,11,0.1); color: #f59e0b; } .ds-badge--critical { background: rgba(239,68,68,0.1); color: #ef4444; }

components.name: Toolbar Container
components.description: Filter/search toolbar that appears above tables. Contains search input and select dropdowns. 12px radius (lg), no shadow.
components.css: .ds-toolbar { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 16px; padding: 16px; background: #1a1d27; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); font-family: Inter, -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-input-search { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; min-width: 240px; } .ds-input-search__icon { position: absolute; left: 12px; color: #94a3b8; pointer-events: none; transition: color 200ms ease; } .ds-input-search:focus-within .ds-input-search__icon { color: #3c83f6; } .ds-input-search input { width: 100%; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border: 1px solid transparent; padding: 0.6rem 1rem 0.6rem 2.5rem; border-radius: 8px; color: #e2e8f0; font-family: inherit; font-size: 0.875rem; outline: none; transition: box-shadow 200ms ease, border-color 200ms ease; } .ds-input-search input::placeholder { color: #94a3b8; } .ds-input-search input:focus { border-color: #3c83f6; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(60,131,246,0.2); } .ds-select-wrapper { position: relative; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border-radius: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; } .ds-select-wrapper select { padding: 0.6rem 2rem 0.6rem 2.2rem; appearance: none; background: transparent; color: #e2e8f0; font-size: 0.875rem; cursor: pointer; min-width: 140px; border: none; outline: none; font-family: inherit; } .ds-select-wrapper select option { background: #1a1d27; }

narrative.overview:
gram is a tool that knows what it owns. The visual system reflects the discipline of infrastructure management itself: every element has a purpose, every color carries a meaning, every transition communicates state — not decoration. The interface doesn't try to impress; it tries to disappear into the work.

The system runs dark by default. IT technicians and admins work against this Midnight Registry background for hours at a time, in server rooms and low-ambient-light offices where a cream or white surface would be glare. The dark palette is a functional decision, not a trend.

Color is a semantic vocabulary, not a styling choice. Signal Blue for primary actions. Go Signal green for active assets. Alert Amber for maintenance warnings. Critical Red for retired or failed states. Diagnostic Teal for definitions and categorization. Relation Violet for graph relationships. This vocabulary must be consistent across every view.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-first, low-glare surface designed for sustained operational use
Semantic color system — every color has exactly one role; consistency is the point
Information-dense by design: tables, stats, and tree views with minimal whitespace
Tonal surface layering as the primary depth signal — shadows are purposeful exceptions
Firm, transparent components: flat at rest, state-driven feedback only
Single type family (Inter) across all roles — weight and size carry hierarchy

rules.name: The Signal Vocabulary Rule
rules.body: Blue is action. Green is active. Amber is maintenance. Red is retired or destructive. Cyan is categorization. Violet is relationships. Each color has exactly one semantic role. A blue badge or a green button violates the vocabulary and destroys status trust.

rules.name: The Dim Text Ceiling Rule
rules.body: --text-dim (#64748b) must not appear on inline body content or table cells. Its contrast on --bg-card is approximately 3.2:1 — below WCAG AA. It exists for version strings and deemphasized metadata only.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: No display typeface, no serif pairing, no decorative font for headings. Inter at 700 is the heading; Inter at 400 is the body. Hierarchy through weight alone.

rules.name: The Label Ceiling Rule
rules.body: Uppercase tracked labels exist exclusively as table column headers — a data affordance for column scanning. Using them above sections, cards, or page areas is the eyebrow anti-pattern.

rules.name: The Tonal-First Rule
rules.body: New surfaces use the tonal step (registry → elevated surface) before adding a shadow. Shadows are earned by position above the card plane — modals, tooltips, dropdowns.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Hover states may use translateY(-2px) transforms on interactive cards to signal interactivity; this is a state response, not a decorative default.

rules.name: The Status Color Rule
rules.body: Badge background is always the semantic color at 10% opacity. Badge text is always the same semantic color at full opacity. No neutral backgrounds on status badges.

dos: Do apply the Signal Vocabulary consistently: blue = action, green = active, amber = maintenance, red = retired/destructive, cyan = category, violet = relationship.
Do use tonal layering (Midnight Registry → Elevated Surface) before reaching for a shadow.
Do restrict uppercase tracked labels to table column headers only.
Do use --text-secondary (#e2e8f0) for all inline body text in tables and forms.
Do size asset icon containers to the context (32px in tables, 48px in cards) and always use the asset type's own hex color.
Do set cursor: not-allowed and 0.45-0.7 opacity on disabled states — no color change.
Do use rgba(60, 131, 246, 0.2) as the focus ring for all interactive elements.
donts: Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient). The .gradient-text utility is an explicit anti-reference per PRODUCT.md — retire it.
Don't use glassmorphism (backdrop-filter: blur on translucent cards) as a general panel treatment. The login card is the sole exception.
Don't add decorative animations or page-load choreography. Motion is state change and feedback only, 150-200ms max.
Don't use Signal Blue on anything that isn't a primary action, active selection, or focused input.
Don't use --text-dim (#64748b) for readable body text. It fails WCAG AA on --bg-card.
Don't nest cards. A content container inside a card surface is always a structural error.
Don't use rounded-full buttons for primary CTAs. gram's 12px radius is intentional — firm and precise.
Don't ship a new page without a Display heading and Slate Muted subtitle — every authenticated page follows this two-line header pattern.
Don't apply flashy gradient fills, neon-glow decorations, or hero-metric tile templates to dashboards.
